features.rothText: The Company may make discretionary matching contributions, on a per pay period basis, allocated in an amount equal to a uniform percentage of the participant’s elective salary deferrals, including Roth contributions, or catch-up contributions.
features.loansText: -10- STANISLAUS SURGICAL HOSPITAL 401(K) PLAN NOTES TO THE FINANCIAL STATEMENTS DECEMBER 31, 2024 AND 2023 NOTE'1 - DESCRIPTION OF PLAN (Cont.) Notes Receivable from Participants Participants may borrow from their funds a minimum of $1,000 and a maximum equal to the lesser of 50% of their vested …
features.autoEnrollText: Automatically enrolled participants have their deferral rate set at 3% of eligible compensation and their contribution invested in a designated pooled separate fund until changed by the participant.
